note: Runner scenario 1 (SimpleCalls): per iteration Spin(300) directly, then SimpleCall1 → Spin(200) + SimpleCall2 → Spin(100). SimpleCall2's body is a single Spin call, which MSVC eliminates as a tail call in Release even with __declspec(noinline) — so SimpleCall2's 100ms gets attributed to SimpleCalls (its grandparent caller). The expected split is therefore (300+100)/600 = 67% direct + 200/600 = 33% via SimpleCall1; SimpleCall2 itself never appears as a frame.
